TERMS & CONDITIONS
NOTE Prices quoted are applicable for the packaged offer only. In the event of any discrepancy between this quotation and the Customer’s Purchase Order (PO), the terms and conditions stated in this quotation shall prevail unless otherwise mutually agreed in writing. Ex-stock items are subject to availability on a first-come, first-served basis.
VALIDITY This quotation shall remain valid until 5:00 PM on the above-mentioned date. Notwithstanding the validity period stated herein, prices are subject to adjustment should the London Metal Exchange (LME) copper price exceed USD per metric ton (MT) during the quotation validity period.
TERM Payment shall be made in full and cleared prior to delivery. All banking and related charges shall be borne solely by the Customer. A draft copy of the Letter of Credit (LC) shall be submitted to us for review and comments prior to issuance through the bank, subject to mutual agreement by both parties. Any overdue outstanding amounts must be fully settled before commencement of any subsequent deliveries.
INTEREST Interest at the rate of 1.5% per month shall be charged on all overdue outstanding amounts until full settlement is received.
TAX (SST) All prices quoted are subject to 10% Sales and Service Tax (SST), where applicable, and shall be treated as included or excluded based on the quotation summary stated herein.
DELIVERY Delivery shall be based on one (1) full lorry load per trip to a single designated delivery location within major towns in Peninsular Malaysia, excluding construction sites unless otherwise agreed. Unloading at site is excluded unless otherwise stated. The name and identity card/passport number of the authorised receiving personnel must be provided prior to arranging delivery.
LEAD TIME Upon receipt of Customer’s Purchase Order (PO), ex-stock items shall be subject to immediate allocation, while non-stock items shall commence within 2–4 working weeks or in accordance with mutually agreed delivery schedules, subject to breakdown lengths and all necessary approvals where applicable. Delivery of ex-stock items shall be completed within one (1) month from receipt of Customer’s PO.
PACKING Packing shall be in wooden drums or standard coils without drums, unless otherwise specified.
STANDARD LENGTH Supply shall be based on DNF CABLE SDN BHD standard or available stock lengths. Lengths exceeding standard or existing stock lengths shall be subject to additional charges.
QUANTITY VARIATION Quantity tolerance of ±3% shall apply.
STORAGE Storage charges at the rate of 1.5% per month shall apply to cables stored in our warehouse beyond one (1) month from the confirmed or estimated delivery date. The Supplier shall not be held responsible for any wear and tear, deterioration, or damage to cable drums arising during the storage period.
CANCELLATION For confirmed Purchase Orders (PO), any cancellation, deferment, or reduction in order quantity may be subject to a penalty charge of up to 50% of the PO value to cover production, material procurement, and associated commercial costs.
FAT The Supplier’s factory test results and inspection findings shall be deemed final and conclusive. Any inspection, witnessing, or testing requested in the presence of a third party shall be subject to all related costs, fees, and expenses being borne solely by the Buyer.
WARRANTY A one (1) year warranty shall apply solely to manufacturing defects under proper handling, installation, and operating conditions, and shall exclude damages arising from improper installation, misuse, negligence, external factors, unauthorised modifications, or normal wear and tear.
Thank you for the opportunity to submit our quotation for the supply of power cables. DNF CABLE SDN BHD remains committed to delivering high-quality cable solutions that comply with international standards, technical specifications, and project requirements.
